name: R5NarrativeElementMapToR4
title: Cross-version mapping for FHIR R5 Narrative to FHIR R4 Narrative
description: This ConceptMap represents cross-version mappings for elements from a FHIR R5 Narrative to FHIR R4.

target.comment: Element `Narrative.status` is mapped to FHIR R4 element `Narrative.status` as `Equivalent`.
Element `Narrative.status` is mapped to FHIR R4 element `Narrative.status` as `Equivalent`.

Element `Narrative.div` is mapped to FHIR R4 element `Narrative.div` as `Equivalent`.
The contents of the html element are an XHTML fragment containing only the basic html formatting elements described in chapters 7-11 and 15 of the HTML 4.0 standard, <a> elements (either name or href), images and internally contained stylesheets. The XHTML content SHALL NOT contain a head, a body, external stylesheet references, scripts, forms, base/link/xlink, frames, iframes and objects.

Element `Narrative.div` is mapped to FHIR R4 element `Narrative.div` as `Equivalent`.
The contents of the html element are an XHTML fragment containing only the basic html formatting elements described in chapters 7-11 and 15 of the HTML 4.0 standard, <a> elements (either name or href), images and internally contained stylesheets.
